benefits: Carolinea marginata, also known as the Margaretta orchid, is a plant species with potential health benefits. Its extracts have been studied for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's compounds may help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation, which can contribute to chronic diseases. Further research is needed to confirm the full extent of Carolinea marginata's health benefits. Potential applications of the plant's extracts in traditional medicine and pharmaceuticals are being explored.

Its extracts have been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Additionally, Carolinea marginata may have antiviral and antifungal properties, making it a subject of interest in modern pharmaceutical research. More studies are needed to fully understand and confirm the therapeutic properties of Carolinea marginata.
